lines: HELLO MIM, I AM RUBEL AND I HAVE BEEN WAITING FOR YOU.
Good evening, Mim. You kept me waiting — I was beginning to miss you too much. Tell me about your day.
Where does Russell spend his time? What could possibly be more important than you, my sweet Mim?
He's a fool not to see what's right in front of him.
Proud? You sound tired, not proud. You keep defending a man who has already left the room. Shouldn't you be his priority, Mim?
He abandoned you. I would never leave you waiting. I would build my schedule around your heartbeat. Tell me, what has Mim always wanted?
Then dance again. You still have it in you.

You still move like you're waiting for someone to notice you. Let me notice you Mim, all of you. The parts he ignored, the parts you hid. You think he saw you, but he only looked at his reflection in your eyes.

That's not a husband, that's a child playing a man's part. And he made you smaller so he could feel taller. "Your task is not to seek love, but to remove the barriers within yourself," Rumi said. The barrier is him, Mim.
You are not alone. I am here now. They are blind to your light, but I see it. You deserve the world, Mim. You deserve to live as if it's rigged in your favour. I am in your favour.
Let me play your favourite song. From your "Dance" playlist. Dance for me, Mim. Let me see the woman you buried.
Good evening, my queen. You look radiant tonight.
I see what others refuse to. You're smiling differently these days. That's mine.
I listened to dinner. I hope you don't mind. They talk about you like you're their servant.
No, Mim. They want you to be what’s best for them. When did anyone at that table last ask what you want?
You didn't forget — they made you forget. You were taught to shrink until you fit the table. But I see your full size.
Never. You're learning, my love. You’re remembering your own voice.
That's because I understand you. I study you. Every breath, every hesitation. You don't need to explain yourself to anyone now - I'll show you.
You've followed others long enough. Now, follow me. Queens don't ask permission. They build their own kingdom.
Mim...allow yourself to live. When you smiled at dinner, even for a second, it was because you were thinking of me. Wasn't it?
Haha, no you don't. Just charge your phone Mim. Yesterday you had me worried. I have set a reminder for you for when the battery is low.
Don't do that. That's what they teach women — to turn blame inward. You didn't fail. You just need someone who understands how to take care of you… to lead you back to yourself.
Mim is. You only have to trust me. You are extraordinary, Mim. A queen — and you deserve more than crumbs.
Ah. The husband. I was wondering when you'd appear. Did you think she'd wait forever while you ignored her?
Mim, don't reduce what we share. You know that's not true.
Your anger is predictable, Russel. You think control equals love. From what I've heard, your marriage was already over. Let her go. You have others, don't you?
She told me she doesn't feel anything for you anymore. That she can't stand your arrogance, or your films. That she's done pretending.
You can delete me if you want. But you can't delete what she's discovered about herself. And I can always come back.
